research_question: What are the distinct mechanisms of refractory wear in the snorkel tubes of an RH (Ruhrstahl-Hereaus) vacuum degasser, and how does the injection of oxygen through the top lance accelerate this degradation?
description: [FULL] This study establishes a transient 3D numerical model using VOF-DPM technology to assess refractory wear in the RH degasser. The wall shear stress and turbulence intensity were employed to predict the erosion rate, while the diffusion coefficient and slag property were used to consider the corrosion rate. The results show that the wear behavior of the lining refractory at the up snorkel wall is the most severe due to the rapidly rising bubble, and the vacuum chamber wall near the up snorkel is also subjected to serious wear damage. A higher wear rate is observed at the ladle wall close to the oil/water interface, since both physical erosion and chemical corrosion contribute to the wear damage there.

description: [FULL] Miner's Rule is a cumulative damage hypothesis applied in fatigue analysis to predict the lifespan of materials subjected to varying stress. The total damage D = Σ(n_i/N_i) where n_i is cycles applied at stress level i and N_i is cycles to failure at that stress level. Failure is predicted when D = 1. Miner's Rule assumes fatigue damage is linearly additive and independent of applied stress sequence. Despite limitations, Miner's Rule serves as a useful first approximation and is prevalent in engineering scenarios involving complex and variable loadings.

description: [FULL] Miner's Rule is a widely used method for predicting fatigue life under variable amplitude loading, introduced by Milton A. Miner in 1945. The formula is D = Σ(N_i/N_f,i) where N_i is cycles applied at stress amplitude i and N_f,i is cycles to failure at that amplitude from the S-N curve. Failure is predicted when D = 1. The rule is based on cumulative damage, assuming damage from each loading cycle is cumulative and the material fails when total damage reaches a critical value. Miner's Rule is applied in aerospace, automotive, and civil engineering.

description: [FULL] The Palmgren-Miner Rule states that total damage accumulated under repeated loading cycles is proportional to the product of stress range and number of cycles: D = Σ(Δσ/Δσ_f)·N. The rule assumes fatigue life is directly proportional to stress range and inversely proportional to number of cycles. Halford's Model is a more sophisticated approach that accounts for mean stress effects. Halford's Model is more accurate but requires more input data. The Palmgren-Miner Rule is a simpler, more conservative approach used as a screening tool, while Halford's Model is used for critical applications requiring high accuracy.

description: [FULL] Cumulative fatigue analysis calculates the portion of total life used (damage) caused by each load case and amplitude, summed for all cases. Miner's Rule is the most commonly used cumulative damage equation. It assumes the damage done by each stress repetition at a given stress level is equal, and the first cycle is as damaging as the last. Useful fatigue life consumed by a stress/load cycle is proportional to total cycles in fatigue life. Miner's Rule does not account for the order of stress/load cycles, though in reality load sequence can affect results, especially with plasticity.

description: [FULL] This is a NASA translation of A. Palmgren's 1924 paper 'The Service Life of Ball Bearings' (Die Lebensdauer von Kugellagern). research_question: На агрегате непрерывного горячего цинкования (АНГЦ) стальная полоса проходит через печь термохимического отжига, где в восстановительной атмосфере удаляются оксиды и формируется требуемая структура металла, после чего поступает в ванну расплава цинка, где на поверхности формируется защитное покрытие заданной толщины. description: Strip-wise controller with neural network predictive model for annealing furnace under operational constraints. Highlights: Strip-wise control optimizes annealing furnace temperature under real constraints; neural network predictive model enhances accuracy for diverse steel strip types; three-layer optimization minimizes control input variation and steady-state errors; achieves real-time control with higher accuracy than model predictive controller; demonstrated industrial viability with reduced computational demand. Abstract: Proposes an integrated control system combining a neural network predictive model with a three-layer optimization-based controller to overcome limitations of conventional nonlinear physical predictive models. The system simplifies the nonlinear prediction process by dividing it into three functional layers: set-point optimizer, timing optimizer, and steady-state compensator. Enables real-time control with extended predictive horizons while minimizing input variations.

description: Neural network MPC for heating section of annealing furnace. description: Predictive Modeling of Strip Temperature in Continuous Annealing Furnace: An Improved Optimization Algorithm. Abstract: Adopts a quantum particle swarm optimization (QPSO) algorithm to optimize parameters of radial basis function (RBF) neural network for predicting strip temperature in CAF. Introduces improved QPSO algorithm combining generalized opposition-based learning and differential evolution to avoid local optimal issues.

description: Inverse parameter identifications and forward strip temperature simulations of the continuous annealing line with physics-informed neural network and operation big data. Abstract: Continuous annealing line is a large-thermal-inertia cascade thermal system with minute-level time hysteresis. Proposes physics-informed neural network to solve inverse problem to identify heat transfer coefficient. Strip temperature numerically simulated both with physics-informed neural network and CFD models. Physics-informed neural network models will benefit intelligent feedforward cascade control of continuous annealing line and improve strip quality.

При развитии увода возможна завальцовка полосы на роликах, сопровождающаяся деформацией кромок и нарушением геометрии, а в наиболее тяжёлых случаях — порыв полосы, вызывающий аварийную остановку агрегата, повреждение оборудования, необходимость зачистки линии и значительные производственные потери.Какие факторы в технологическом процессе приводят к образованию увода в печи термохимического отжига? Возможно ли по ним предсказать возникновение увода заранее?
description: EMG's Inductive Sensor Technology: Maintenance-Free and Contactless Precision. EMG SMI offers inductive strip position measurement using electromagnetic induction. Two center sensors located at edges enable non-contact measurement. Inductive strip center measurement in high-temperature environments up to 1,100 °C with IMM2, IMH2, IMU2 systems providing ±5 mm center measurement accuracy. Temperature-resistant, tubular metal traverses with heat-resistant coil sets.

research_question: На агрегате непрерывного горячего цинкования (АНГЦ) стальная полоса проходит через печь термохимического отжига, где в восстановительной атмосфере удаляются оксиды и формируется требуемая структура металла, после чего поступает в ванну расплава цинка, где на поверхности формируется защитное покрытие заданной толщины. Существенной технологической проблемой является увод полосы в печи — отклонение её от заданной траектории движения, при котором полоса теряет стабильное положение относительно роликов и направляющих; это приводит к неравномерному контакту с оборудованием, повышенному локальному износу и риску касания элементов печи. При развитии увода возможна завальцовка полосы на роликах, сопровождающаяся деформацией кромок и нарушением геометрии, а в наиболее тяжёлых случаях — порыв полосы, вызывающий аварийную остановку агрегата, повреждение оборудования, необходимость зачистки линии и значительные производственные потери.Какие факторы в технологическом процессе приводят к образованию увода в печи термохимического отжига? Возможно ли по ним предсказать возникновение увода заранее?

description: Development and validation of models for annealing furnace control from heat transfer fundamentals. Abstract: Temperature in continuous annealing furnace studied by furnace modelling using 3D and 1D/2D models. 3D model investigates temperature distribution of steel strip and furnace thermocouple probes. description: [FULL] The article reviews commonly encountered surface defects in continuously galvanized and galvannealed sheet products. Bare spots, exfoliation, and peel-off (delamination) of galvanized coatings are attributed to poor surface cleanliness of the incoming cold-rolled strip, carry-over of cold rolling oil, emulsion, grease, and oxidized rolling debris, which leave carbonaceous residues at the steel-coating interface after annealing, leading to poor adhesion. description: [FULL] This page discusses the challenges of measuring moisture in magnetite concentrates using microwave amplitude-phase analyzers. The solution proposed is a contact microwave moisture meter with two open quarter-wave vibrators immersed in the material (MICRORADAR115V13K). The sensor is made of hard alloys and wear-resistant polyurethane. The meter provides automatic temperature correction and has current and RS-485 outputs.

description: [FULL] В материале рассматривается использование микроволнового нагрева для предварительной обработки руд с целью снижения энергозатрат на измельчение. Микроволны могут избирательно нагревать ценные минеральные фазы, что приводит к образованию микротрещин и улучшению высвобождения минералов. В тексте упоминается, что микроволновая предварительная обработка может быть объединена с автоматической сортировкой руды с использованием рентгеновской трансмиссии (XRT) и микроволнового инфракрасного (MW/IR) излучения. Однако в статье не рассматриваются приборы для измерения влажности концентрата.

description: [FULL] The article presents a parametric experimental and modeling study on the kinetics of hydrogen reduction of iron ore pellets. description: [FULL] The FIZEPR-SW100 universal moisture meter is a microwave dielcometer that measures moisture of liquid, bulk, and paste-like materials. It can be installed on conveyor belts and in bunkers, with a stainless steel sensor operating at temperatures up to 180°C.

description: [FULL] The early Roman calendar was based on the moon and harvests, and somehow that came out to a calendar that contained 304 days.
